name: Naturepedia Plate Registry
description: Machine-readable semantic registry for Naturepedia Plate systems, recursive compression interfaces, JSON-LD semantic nodes, field observation systems, governance systems, pricing systems, species plates, track plates, photography guide plates, field location plates, water systems, ecosystem systems, and distributed ecological knowledge graph relationships.
keywords: Mathematical Formalization of Recursive Registry Inheritance

additionalProperty.name: Recursive Registry Inheritance Principle
additionalProperty.value: Compressed registries may become the substrate for future compression cycles.

additionalProperty.name: RC-17
additionalProperty.value: Canonical Claim RC-17 — Recursive Registry Inheritance Principle.

additionalProperty.name: Appendix I
additionalProperty.value: Mathematical Formalization of Recursive Registry Inheritance in the Grand Compression Master Reference Document.

additionalProperty.name: RRIP Formal Sequence
additionalProperty.value: Plate™ → Registry → Meta-Registry → Graph Registry™ → Knowledge Mesh

additionalProperty.name: Registry Interpretation
additionalProperty.value: Registries function as reusable cognitive infrastructure rather than passive storage.
